lessons.title: What is Machine Learning?
lessons.content:
Machine Learning Overview

Machine learning is a subfield of artificial intelligence (AI) that focuses on the development of algorithms that allow computers to learn from and make predictions or decisions based on data.

lessons.title: Types of Machine Learning
lessons.content:
The Three Main Types

  • Supervised Learning: The algorithm is trained on a labeled dataset.
  • Unsupervised Learning: The algorithm is trained on an unlabeled dataset.
  • Reinforcement Learning: The algorithm learns by trial and error using rewards and punishments.

quiz.question: Which type of learning involves training a model on labeled data?
Overfitting occurs when a model:
options: Learns the noise in the training data instead of the pattern
Is too simple for the data
